findings.summary: Knowledge information must be modeled as a typed dependency graph and consumed in dependency order.
findings.recommendation: Define edge semantics, deterministic ordering, cycle/dangling checks, and shared consumption by elicitation and compilation.

findings.summary: System domains need upstream doctrine anchors without prematurely fixing concrete technologies.
findings.recommendation: Use Apple HIG, Clean Architecture, OWASP, and Google SRE as one authority per design concern and map every in-scope category to the applicable concerns.

findings.summary: The plan must state what information is required and what missing information blocks construction.
findings.recommendation: Give required-info items a minimum schema, domain coverage floor, dependency order, completion rule, and explicit missing-effect state.
